name: Krauss-Maffei
answerBox: Centrifuge World is an independent specialist that repairs, rebuilds, and supplies parts for Krauss-Maffei centrifuges. Our Houston and Chicago service centers deliver full non-destructive inspection, structural welding, wear-part refitting, precision balancing, and reverse-engineered parts to restore your Krauss-Maffei machine to peak performance and reduce process downtime.
intro: Krauss-Maffei centrifuges are used in demanding chemical, pharmaceutical, and process filtration applications. Centrifuge World provides independent repair, rebuild, and reverse-engineered parts support to keep these machines running at optimal efficiency.
disclosure: Centrifuge World is an independent repair and rebuild specialist. We are not affiliated with Krauss-Maffei.

capabilities.detail: Complete disassembly and inspection of your Krauss-Maffei centrifuge, followed by a written report with findings and recommended repairs.
Repair of areas damaged by mechanical stress, chemical attack, or erosion.
Replacement of o-rings, gaskets, filter media components, and other consumable wear items.
Replacement of worn or damaged parts and execution of available performance upgrades.
Precision balancing of rotating assemblies to specification.
In-house manufacture of hard-to-find or long-lead OEM-equivalent parts, often within days.

body: Centrifuge World offers a full range of services to help you get the most out of your Krauss-Maffei centrifuge. All work is performed at our service centers in Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois, where our skilled engineers inspect each machine and build the right plan for repair or rebuild.

For every industrial centrifuge we handle, we provide comprehensive reconditioning and repair designed to keep equipment operating at high efficiency and to reduce process downtime. Routine maintenance is essential, and our engineers are available to troubleshoot issues or schedule an inspection.

Getting an inspection is straightforward: call to schedule, and we dispatch a truck to your location. Once the machine reaches our shop, we perform a complete non-destructive teardown inspection. You then receive a detailed report summarizing the findings, a repair recommendation, and a list of parts that require replacement.

When Krauss-Maffei rotating equipment needs repair, we perform standard maintenance, structural welding of damaged areas, refitting of wear parts such as o-rings and gaskets, replacement of worn components, available upgrades, static and dynamic balancing, and a test run where the equipment allows.

OEM-equivalent parts for your Krauss-Maffei centrifuge are available from Centrifuge World. When a part is hard to source or carries a long lead time, our shop can reverse engineer and fabricate it, frequently turning parts around in a matter of days. For emergency breakdowns, rush service is available around the clock.

faqs.question: Does Centrifuge World service Krauss-Maffei centrifuges?
faqs.answer: Yes. As an independent specialist, we repair and rebuild Krauss-Maffei centrifuges at our Houston and Chicago service centers, including non-destructive inspection, welding, wear-part replacement, and balancing.

faqs.question: Can you supply parts for a Krauss-Maffei centrifuge?
faqs.answer: We supply OEM-equivalent parts and can reverse engineer and fabricate hard-to-find or long-lead components in-house, often within days.

faqs.question: What types of Krauss-Maffei centrifuges do you repair?
faqs.answer: We service filtering and sedimenting Krauss-Maffei machines, including peeler, pusher, inverting filter, and decanter centrifuges. Contact us with your model to confirm scope.

seoTitle: Krauss-Maffei Centrifuge Repair & Rebuild | Centrifuge World
seoDescription: Independent Krauss-Maffei centrifuge repair, rebuild, and parts for peeler, pusher, inverting filter, and decanter machines. Inspection and balancing.
